title: Anika 67039 LED Vanity Mirror | Bathroom/Makeup/Bedroom Mirror | 360° Swivel Rotation | 5 x Magnification | Grey Colour | Battery Operated | 31cm x 18.5cm x 10.5cm
features: FREESTANDING VANITY MIRROR – This 31cm x 18.5cm freestanding grey coloured bathroom mirror is the perfect size to assist with applying makeup, eyeliner, eyeshadow, lipstick and assisting with shaving.
5 TIMES MAGNIFICATION – This vanity mirror magnifies up to 5 times the normal size when rotated around, allowing for easier application of makeup and support with close hand grooming.
360° SWIVEL ROTATION – Rotate this bathroom mirror 360° to aid with your beauty routine. This makeup mirror also comes with a weighted base to stabilise the whole mirror unit.

LED LIGHTS – This bathroom essential has been fitted with bright LED lights that illuminate the surface area to further assist in your daily routine. The lights turn on and off quickly thanks to the touch activated button on the mirrors surface.
ANIKA – Anika is the leading manufacturer of homeware, bathroom and kitchen essentials. View the Anika store on Amazon to view the whole range today.
description: From the manufacturer LED VANITY MIRRORS These LED light-up vanity mirrors are the perfect accompaniment to assist you in the application of your make-up. Use them either in your bedroom or bathroom. Choose from either white, black or grey. The vanity mirrors are battery operated, and offer a touch screen that allows you to easily flick between the lights being on or off. The mirror also offers 5 x magnification, which allows you to get up close and personal with your make-up application. All of the mirrors are freestanding, and they all feature a dynamic 360° swivel system, that gives you the availability to set your mirror to the preferred angle you require for make-up application. KEY FEATURES: 3 Separate Colours 360° Swivel Rotation 5 x Magnification Battery Operated 31cm x 18.5cm x 10.5cm 360° SWIVEL ROTATION Rotate your mirror 360° to get the perfect angle for make-up application. 5 TIMES MAGNIFICATION Choose between a standard mirror or one with 5 times the magnification. TOUCH ACTIVATED Touch the bottom of the mirror to activate the bright LED lights. product_details_tab_data.Safety Warning: WARNING: Keep batteries out of reach of children. Dispose of used batteries in accordance with local regulations. Do not use the mirror near water. Be cautious when handling the mirror to avoid injury from the round shape. Always place the mirror on a stable surface to prevent it from tipping over and breaking.
